mapper.update: UPDATE chat_member SET member_name = #{memberName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, join_time = #{joinTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, role = #{role,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_read_message_id = #{lastReadMessageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, unread_count = #{unreadCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_member WHERE chat_id = #{chatId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 0 ORDER BY role DESC, join_time ASC
SELECT * FROM chat_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND member_type = #{memberType,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND status = 0
